text: Section BDF Book System. Tags, Book, Project, Book Project. BDF Book Status, Active Created. 2020-60505 updated. 2020-60520 domain, Creative Systems Section, BDF Book System. What this is? Automated Knowledge Compilation Pipeline for Breaking Down Football. Session logs are compiled into structured chapters by Claude Opus, stitched into a masterbook, converted to audio via Kakoro TTS, and synced to Google Drive. Why it exists? Preserve and distribute BDF technical and creative knowledge built across sessions. Section, Pipeline. Code block begins session log, incoming backslash right arrow BDF Book Run. Section TTS slash hugging face off. TTS local. Pinew calls hugging face hub log in token equals HF token at startup. HF token must be set in end and load do 10 is called at module import. Without this, model downloads fail silently. Section, drive phase organization 2026 0524.
